# Resource (hush_bedrock_access_credential)

Manage Bedrock dynamic access credentials in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a Bedrock access credential with explicit AWS keys
resource "hush_bedrock_access_credential" "example" {
  name           = "my-bedrock-credential"
  description    = "Bedrock credential with explicit AWS keys"
  deployment_ids = ["dep-1234567890"]
  region         = "us-east-1"
  access_key_id  = "AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE"

  secret_access_key_wo         = var.aws_secret_access_key
  secret_access_key_wo_version = 1
}

# Create a Bedrock access credential with provider credentials (no explicit keys)
resource "hush_bedrock_access_credential" "provider_creds" {
  name           = "my-bedrock-provider-creds"
  description    = "Bedrock credential using provider credentials"
  deployment_ids = ["dep-1234567890"]
  region         = "us-west-2"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the Bedrock access credential
- `deployment_ids` (List of String) List of deployment IDs that can access this credential
- `region` (String) The AWS region for Bedrock (e.g., us-east-1)

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the Bedrock access credential
- `access_key_id` (String) The AWS access key ID. Must be set together with secret_access_key or secret_access_key_wo. Omit for provider credentials mode.
- `secret_access_key` (String, Sensitive) The AWS secret access key
- `secret_access_key_wo` (String, Sensitive, Write-only) The AWS secret access key (write-only). This is a write-only attribute that is more secure than `secret_access_key` because Terraform will not store this value in the state file.
- `secret_access_key_wo_version` (String) Used to trigger updates for `secret_access_key_wo`. Required when using `secret_access_key_wo`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Bedrock access credential
- `has_provider_credentials` (Boolean) Whether the credential uses AWS provider credentials (no explicit access key)
- `type` (String) The type of access credential
- `kind` (String) The kind of access credential
